## Content Collision Prevention

**CRITICAL: Always verify against filesystem before creating content.**
The counts above are snapshots. Always run:
```bash
ls src/content/blog/*.mdx | wc -l
ls src/content/vs/*.mdx | wc -l
ls src/content/use-cases/*.mdx | wc -l
ls src/content/integrations/*.mdx | wc -l
```

Before writing a new post, grep frontmatter titles across all collections to ensure no duplicate topic exists.
